caption: A man wearing a green Real Madrid training kit stands in front of a branded backdrop featuring logos for "LaLiga Santander", "PULEVA", "CAJA RURAL GRANADA", and "CERVEZAS ALHAMBRA", while on-screen text reads "Fly Emirates". The scene shifts to a wider shot of several players in green training gear on a grassy field; some are walking while others stand near a blue banner that says "NUNCA". The perspective then changes to a medium shot of two men in dark suits and ties; the man on the left holds a microphone with a Real Madrid logo and is speaking. Finally, the video shows a different outdoor location where a man in a white shirt and dark pants walks toward a large white team bus. A Real Madrid crest is visible in the upper right corner of the last two frames.
